text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
My rest went as planned. I recuperated the
perfect amount of sleep, down to the minute.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Thus, I am in peak physical condition. I should be
able to complete today's training regime as
scheduled and without issue.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. In fact, I'm already looking forward to
training.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It seems Eishin Flash got plenty of rest!
